message:
Fix clippy warnings from UBS triage (sqlmodel_rust-asm)

- Remove unused import NullsOrder in expr.rs
- Convert map().unwrap_or() to map_or() in builder.rs
- Replace push_str(")") with push(')') for single chars
- Fix float comparison in decode.rs tests using epsilon
- Convert manual async fn patterns to async fn in pool/lib.rs
- Fix field_reassign_with_default using struct init syntax
- Fix no_effect_underscore_binding by adding assertions

All 16 CRITICAL UBS findings were false positives:
- 2 panic! macros in test functions (acceptable)
- 14 "hardcoded secrets" that were variable names with "token"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
